name: R & J Mobility Svc
districts_or_customers: Retail consumers and commercial mobility customers in Medford/Salem OR; historically installed wheelchair lifts on school buses but is NOT a transportation operator
recent_news: Long-established (since 1979) NMEDA-accredited mobility equipment dealer with locations in Medford and Salem; no M&A activity identified
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. R&J is a wheelchair-van dealer and mobility-equipment installer, not a student-transportation operator. Out of scope for Summit.

name: Classic Limousine

recent_news: No news or M&A activity identified; no website found; PO Box address suggests very small owner-operated livery
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Limousine/livery operator, not a school-bus or contracted student-transportation provider. Out of scope for Summit.

name: School Bus Trnsprtn Tyh Corp
principals: Henry Beltran (Owner); likely affiliated with Air B School Bus Transportation, Inc. (same Beltran ownership, 7503 NW 7th St Miami)
districts_or_customers: None confirmed; Miami-Dade FL; FMCSA lists cargo as 'General Freight/Other' not passenger transport
recent_news: Active FL corp (DOT 2916187) but SAFER shows 0 power units; appears to be a dormant or affiliated shell of Air B School Bus Transportation Inc (Henry Beltran), the larger Miami operator
fit_notes: NOT a viable standalone tuck-in. Sub-scale shell (0 power units per FMCSA). If pursued at all, Summit should target the affiliated Air B School Bus Transportation Inc (same Beltran principal) which is the actual operating Miami school-bus contractor.

recent_news: Established 2003; no M&A or sale activity identified; appears to be a stable independent local livery business
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Limousine/airport-transfer operator with no school-district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Out of scope for Summit.
